snippet.title: POTA Tips I Wish I Knew Sooner
snippet.description:
Here's few lil tips that I wish someone had told me before my first Parks on the Air activation. 
After 100+ activations, here's some of the things that I would go back in time and tell myself. 

00:00 Intro - You don't need 100w
00:40 Focus more on your antenna
01:53 Triple check your gear
03:04 Check your UTC day
04:30 Slow down and use phonetics
05:43 YOU are the DX!

_____________________________________________________________________________


Radio Gear:
- Icom IC-706MKIIG with DSP and Narrow CW Filter
- Palm Radio Pico Paddles
- 3d Printed Paddle: K8CES Zippy Paddle
- POTA PERformer Antenna https://kj6er.net/
- Bioenno 12V 20Ah Battery: https://dxengineering.pxf.io/Qjkzja
- 25ft ABR316 BNC Coax https://abrind.com/product/abr316-with-bnc-males-with-5-ferrites/
- 3d Printed EFHW Antenna:  https://www.printables.com/model/398802-qrp-40m-efhw-reel-style-housing
- Weaver Leather Throw Weight: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0044TZVWU
- Weaver Polyethylene Throw Line: https://amazon.com/dp/B0057HYVEW
- Retractable Aux Cable: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00UGA6QIE
- Nite Ize Cam Jam: https://amazon.com/dp/B082YS61HB
- NanoVNA-H: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07Z5VY7B6
- Mobile Logger: Ham2k Polo Powerless logger (the best one tbh) https://polo.ham2k.com/
- Gregory Alpaca Utility Tote Bag 50L  (I use this bag for everything) https://ridgeandriver.com/products/gregory-alpaca-utility-tote-35l-mirage-tan?variant=46530389475466&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=youtube-description&utm_content=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FrWXBIMS0Rew


Camera Gear:
- Sony A7III
- Sony Zeiss 24-70mm f/4 Lens
- DJI Mic 3

snippet.title: How I Went from Technician to Extra with Ham Radio Prep | Ken KR4BMB
snippet.description:
When Ken KR4BMB first got interested in ham radio, he had one major challenge: 👉 He knew virtually nothing about electronics.

Like many newcomers to the hobby, he was starting from scratch.

After finding Ham Radio Prep online, Ken began studying for his Technician license and quickly discovered a learning system that worked for him. After earning his Technician license, he continued his momentum by upgrading to General and eventually tackling the most challenging level of all: Amateur Extra.

According to Ken, the Extra course was a completely different challenge.

📚 More detailed material
🧠 More concepts to master
📡 More information to retain

But one feature stood out and helped him push through:

🎯 Focused review of his most difficult questions

Instead of reviewing hundreds of questions at random, Ham Radio Prep identified the topics he struggled with and allowed him to repeatedly practice those specific questions until they became second nature.

Ken also appreciated the flexibility of the platform:

📱 Study on his phone anywhere
💻 Take realistic practice exams on a computer
🔁 Switch between devices to focus on weak areas

His advice? 👉 Check it out. It works.

73 from KR4BMB 📡

🎓 Whether you’re new to ham radio or upgrading your license, we’ve helped over 60,000 students do the same.

👉 Start learning now: https://www.hamradioprep.com
Try a free lesson, pass the test, and get on the air with confidence!

#HamRadioPrep #HamRadio #TechnicianLicense #GeneralLicense #HT #Simplex #HamRadioBasics #StudentTestimonial #73

snippet.title: The Shack-in-a-Box Buyer’s Guide: Which One You Won’t Regret (IC-705, FTX-1, FT-991A, IC-7100)
snippet.description:
Can one radio really do it all — HF, VHF and UHF, in a single box? I compare five 
"shack in a box" transceivers and dig into the economics, the engineering, and the 
one connectivity gap nobody seems to want to talk about.

We look at the Icom IC-705, the brand-new Yaesu FTX-1 Field and Optima, the 
discontinued-but-loved Yaesu FT-991A, and the twelve-year-old Icom IC-7100 that 
still earns its place on the bench.

Along the way: cost per watt, cost per dBm, watts per kilogram, and why the unit 
you measure in quietly decides the answer you reach.

📊 The full comparison matrix is pinned in the comments.

🔧 RADIOS FEATURED
Icom IC-705 (QRP HF/VHF/UHF)
Yaesu FTX-1 Field & Optima (modular SDR)
Yaesu FT-991A (HF/VHF/UHF all-mode)
Icom IC-7100 (detachable-head mobile)

All specifications verified against manufacturer documentation, June 2026. 
This video is independent and not sponsored by any manufacturer.

💬 Got an opinion on any of these rigs? You will have. That's what the comments 
are for.

👍 If this was useful, a like and a subscribe genuinely helps the channel.

73 de G3LRC — the G3 Local Radio Club

#HamRadio #AmateurRadio #POTA

snippet.title: Florida Nurse Loses License  #news #viral#florida #karolineleavitt#socialmedia #trending #healthcare
snippet.description: After Viral Video Sparks Outrage ⚖️👀Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo has reportedly revoked the license of a former labor and delivery nurse after a disturbing video targeting White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt went viral online.According to reports, the nurse allegedly made comments wishing harm during childbirth, which triggered immediate backlash online and led to disciplinary action from Florida officials.The situation has sparked major debate across social media about professional ethics, free speech, and whether healthcare workers should face consequences for inflammatory public statements tied to their field of work. 👀💭Many online users say the case highlights how quickly social media posts can impact careers and reputations in today’s digital world.

Truck driving is an immensely rewarding career choice that offers individuals a unique blend of independence, responsibility, and financial stability. Obtaining a Commercial Driver's License (CDL) is the first crucial step toward entering the trucking industry, opening doors to a plethora of opportunities. With a CDL in hand, aspiring truckers embark on a journey that goes beyond mere transportation; it's a lifestyle that involves navigating the open road, connecting communities, and ensuring the seamless flow of goods across the nation. In the world of trucking, a CDL is not just a license but a passport to a diverse array of experiences. The demand for skilled drivers continues to rise, making truck driving a dynamic and secure profession. The essence of trucking lies not just in the movement of cargo but in the sense of accomplishment derived from overcoming challenges on the road. Trucking, with its CDL prerequisite, offers a fulfilling career where individuals become the backbone of the economy, driving progress with every mile.

snippet.title: LE PIRE DES CONFÉRENCES DE 2026 ! 🤣 (ft.Terra, Pota, Grim, Théo & Jean)
snippet.description:

snippet.title: I1WKN e il compleanno in quota
snippet.description: Il compleanno di I1WKN Beppe è, da tempo, una dichiarazione d'amore a due passioni di una vita: la radio e la montagna. La sintesi perfetta tra questi mondi è l'attivazione di una cima del programma (Sota) Summits On The Air. Beppe l'anno scorso aveva salito il Mont Fallère e, quest'anno, scegliendo sempre la Valle d'Aosta come meta, è stato sul Corno Vitello. Come nel 2025, anche se ero in città e non a casa, ho preso con me un portatile per non perdere il collegamento e fare auguri consoni allo stile scelto per una giornata speciale. Auguri Beppe, cento di queste vette e di questi collegamenti!

snippet.title: Трансивер HF SW2016: Такого дефекта я ещё не встречал! Конденсатор-микрофон!
snippet.description:
Продолжаем ремонт радиостанций серии SW. В этот раз в ремонт  SW-2016 с очень необычной неисправностью: на приёме появлялись свист, репение и искажения, причём дефект зависел даже от положения корпуса.
В процессе диагностики удалось обнаружить редкий эффект — проходной керамический конденсатор фактически работал как микрофон и вызывал акустическую обратную связь. Кроме устранения этой неисправности проверяем чувствительность приёмника, настраиваем опорные генераторы и кварцевые фильтры, регулируем подавление несущей в SSB, оцениваем качество сигнала через SDR и проверяем выходную мощность на диапазонах.
В конце — проверка радиостанции в реальном эфире и оценка качества сигнала после ремонта.

⏰    Временное оглавление: 
00:00 - Вступление и описание неисправности
01:53 - Вскрытие и осмотр конструкции
02:42 - Поиск дефекта
04:30 - Подтверждение причины неисправности
05:13 - Проверка и настройка радиостанции
06:28 - Проверка передатчика через SDR
07:41 - Измерение выходной мощности
08:38 - Тест радиостанции в эфире

🎁 Вы можете поддержать канал на BuyMeCoffee ☕ https://buymeacoffee.com/mihaelectron

#SW2016 #HFtransceiver #hamradio #радиолюбитель #ssb #amateurradio

Want to talk to astronauts on the International Space Station, assist during local emergencies, or chat globally without cell towers or the internet? 🇨🇦 In this video, I break down exactly how to become a licensed ham radio operator in Canada step-by-step!
Getting your Amateur Radio Operator Certificate from ISED Canada is easier than you think, valid for life, and costs nothing to renew. I'll show you how to study for free, how to guarantee you unlock the global high-frequency (HF) bands on your first try, and how to take your exam online right from home!

snippet.title: 5 Things Nobody Told Me Before I Got My Ham Radio License
snippet.description:
Free Video Course - The Top 5 Beginner Ham Radio Frustrations (and How To Overcome Them): https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/free

Passing the ham radio test was the easy part. Nobody told me what came after. In this video I'm breaking down the 5 things I wish someone had told me before I got my license — from mic fright to why the repeaters seem to be silent, to the Baofeng UV-5R legality problem that nobody on YouTube talks about. If you're studying for your Technician license or you just got it and feel stuck, this is the video I needed in year one.

Links to items mentioned in this video:
• Parks on the Road travel series playlist - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwhBxy-l2D1Vr_QWXIRUH_YBAUhqZsZhS
• Baofeng UV-5R - https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/baofeng-uv5r
• Yaesu FT-710 - https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/yaesu-ft710
• Buddistick Pro Antenna - https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/buddistick-pro
• HamStudy.org - https://hamstudy.org
• HamExam.org - https://hamexam.org
• Why a stock UV-5R isn't legal on FRS or GMRS — straight from the FCC rules:
   • FRS requires a non-removable antenna (§ 95.587)
   • GMRS radios can't be certified if they're also capable of ham operation (§ 95.1761)
   • Source: eCFR, 47 CFR Part 95 — https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-47/chapter-I/subchapter-D/part-95

Timestamps:
0:00 — Nobody told me this before I got licensed
0:47 — #5: The test is a permission slip, not a diploma
2:12 — #4: Your first contact is terrifying (mic fright)
3:46 — #3: The repeaters are quieter than you think
5:39 — #2: The Baofeng legality problem
7:47 — #1: Ham radio has no "bottom"
9:52 — What comes next

If you found this useful, subscribe! There's more where this came from.

#HamRadio #HamRadioLicense #BaofengUV5R #HamRadioForBeginners #AmateurRadio #TechnicianLicense

snippet.title: POTA with my New Alpha Antenna in Huntsville State Park!!
snippet.description:
I'm finally here!! I made it to Huntsville safe and sound. The kids and I are still getting settled in, but so far we're absolutely loving our new home. Now I just have to find a job!! Daunting, but I'll get it done. 

I used my trusty IC-7300 radio of course, and my favorite ABR Industries High Vis coax. I love that coax and it's still holding up great, even after all the shenanigans I've put it through.  

Now, on to my new antenna!! It's the SS17+ Deluxe from Alpha Antenna (@alphaantenna ). I had a blast setting it up, only took about 10 minutes. And that's from someone who didn't know what she was doing!! I will mention, you'll need two PL259 connections for this antenna. The link to their website is https://www.alphaantenna.com/ and this specific antenna you can find here: https://www.alphaantenna.com/product/portable-vertical-vhf-uhf-hf-ham-radio-antenna-vertitenna-pocketenna-7-band/ . 

I can't wait to explore all the parks in and around this area. It's ridiculously beautiful. I'll try to get all my adventures on camera so you can come along with me on my new journey!!

Thanks for watching!! If you're new to my channel, please feel free to hit that like and subscribe, and click that little bell so you don't miss the next video. 

I'll see you all soon!!

73
K8FAE

localized.title: POTA with my New Alpha Antenna in Huntsville State Park!!
localized.description:
I'm finally here!! I made it to Huntsville safe and sound. The kids and I are still getting settled in, but so far we're absolutely loving our new home. Now I just have to find a job!! Daunting, but I'll get it done. 

I used my trusty IC-7300 radio of course, and my favorite ABR Industries High Vis coax. I love that coax and it's still holding up great, even after all the shenanigans I've put it through.  

Now, on to my new antenna!! It's the SS17+ Deluxe from Alpha Antenna (@alphaantenna ). I had a blast setting it up, only took about 10 minutes. And that's from someone who didn't know what she was doing!! I will mention, you'll need two PL259 connections for this antenna. The link to their website is https://www.alphaantenna.com/ and this specific antenna you can find here: https://www.alphaantenna.com/product/portable-vertical-vhf-uhf-hf-ham-radio-antenna-vertitenna-pocketenna-7-band/ . 

I can't wait to explore all the parks in and around this area. It's ridiculously beautiful. I'll try to get all my adventures on camera so you can come along with me on my new journey!!

Thanks for watching!! If you're new to my channel, please feel free to hit that like and subscribe, and click that little bell so you don't miss the next video. 

I'll see you all soon!!

73
K8FAE

snippet.title: Learn About the FlexRadio Aurora HF Radio Directly from the Team that Developed It
snippet.description:
We caught up with Tony, K1KP, Steve N5AC, and Gerald K5SDR from FlexRadio during the 2026 Orlando HamCation to learn all about the Aurora, FlexRadio’s new, incredibly efficient HF+6M SDR ham radio. Packed in an amazingly compact form factor housing, this versatile transceiver has its own built-in power supply and antenna tuner. Better still, you can get an impressive 500W (200W on 6M) of power—and thanks to its efficient design, it doesn’t generate a ton of heat, which means no bulky heatsinks either. In other words, this might be the ultimate portable HF radio. 

Watch the video for a detailed glimpse into the Aurora SDR radio directly from the team that brought it to life, then learn more in the link below.  

Got an idea for a video? Drop us an email at dxengineering@dxengineering.com and put YouTube Video Idea in the Subject line.

Get more details on the FlexRadio Aurora here:
https://www.dxengineering.com/search/brand/flexradio-inc/product-line/flexradio-aurora-500w-hf-6m-sdr-transceivers

snippet.title: My ATNO SOTA Activation | And Summit's First One Too!
snippet.description:
This is my FIRST exclusive #SOTA activation ever! Also, this summit (E7/BO-466) was never activated before so I can brag about it HI!
Pretty intense and steep trail but not highly elevated. In general, it was great experience and I am starting to think that I like #SOTA as much as #POTA.

Gear: #QRP Labs #QMX and homebrew #EFHW 40-10m antenna with CT1CAH pressure paddle.

snippet.title: Yaesu FT-710 Setup in Historic South Texas #hamradio #pota #gear
snippet.description:
Free Video Course - The Top 5 Beginner Ham Radio Frustrations (and How To Overcome Them): https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/free

I set up my ham radio gear, including the Yaesu FT-710 and a Buddystick Pro antenna, for an early morning parks on the air activation in historic south Texas. This video captures my setup at an old Spanish mission, blending the past with modern amateur radio operations. The location's rich history, dating back to the mid-1700s, made for a truly unique POTA activation experience.

snippet.title: What Is DMR? A Beginner’s Guide to Digital Mobile Radio for Ham Radio
snippet.description:
What Is DMR? A Beginner’s Guide to Digital Mobile Radio for Ham Radio explains the basics of DMR and why it has become one of the most popular digital communication methods in amateur radio.

In this video, Cody from BridgeCom Systems breaks down what DMR (Digital Mobile Radio) is, how it evolved from commercial and public safety communications, and why ham radio operators around the world use it today. Learn about DMR IDs, digital voice quality, worldwide communication through linked repeaters and hotspots, and the advantages DMR offers over traditional analog radio systems.

Whether you're new to ham radio or looking to get started with DMR, this video provides a simple introduction to one of the most powerful digital radio technologies available today.

snippet.description:
Вирішальні місяці для України! Президент Володимир Зеленський за підсумками візиту до Естонії та саміту NB8 заявив, що червень і липень стануть визначальними. На тлі пробуксовки американського треку дипломатія фокусується на європейських союзниках: попереду важливі рішення на самітах НАТО та G7, де головним пріоритетом України є мобілізація систем ППО.

Водночас у Європі звучить нова важлива теза: європейські лідери відмовляються бути «медіаторами» (посередниками) у мирних переговорах з Кремлем, адже Путін сприймає будь-які пропозиції діалогу як слабкість. Скільки ще здатна протягнути Москва та чому Європа робить ставку виключно на посилення спроможності ЗСУ атакувати РФ?

snippet.title: CW POTA Twofer! FT-891 Morse Code Activation at US-8143 & US-9757 | Copy Along in Real Time
snippet.description:
Join me for a CW Parks on the Air twofer activation at US-8143 Boggy Depot National Historic Site and US-9757 Butterfield Overland National Historic Trail using the Yaesu FT-891 and my homemade “Pocket Version” wire antenna based on the POTA Challenger concept.

This video is filmed from the operator’s point of view so you can follow every CQ, exchange, and pileup while practicing your own morse code copy in real time. I also show antenna deployment, station setup, and 20m activation footage from the field.

snippet.title: QRO20 goes portable, now with waterfall and ADIF logbook!
snippet.description: My QRO20, with polar modulation and CESSB for 20 meters, is one step closer to doing parks on the air (POTA) and summits on the air (SOTA) this summer! Technically I made my first park-to-park contact (WA - UT), and automatically logged it to an ADIF file, but mostly this was checking the gear out in the field, looking for a final round of bugs to fix.

snippet.title: Get A Contractors License In Chula Vista
snippet.description:
Hola y hello! In this video, Allen from Contractor License School welcomes both English and Spanish-speaking contractors to come get licensed at our Chula Vista location — right at the corner of 3rd and Oxford.

We handle all contractor licenses — General B, flooring, electrical, and everything in between. And the best part? The state only requires THREE things to qualify:

✔️ Be 18 or older / Tener 18 años o más
✔️ Valid Social Security number OR ITIN number
✔️ 4 years of field experience / 4 años de experiencia en el campo

If you have that, we make the rest simple. Our bilingual team is ready to walk you through the entire process — no stress, no confusion.
